```

<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Accepting this trade is the best option as it gives me resources without risking losing everything. It's early in the game, so a small gain is valuable. </reason>
```

Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. Player RED has 100 dollars and is offering 10 dollars to me (who has 0). Since I have nothing to offer, accepting this trade would give me 10 dollars and RED would have 90 dollars. This is a good start, and I should aim to get as many dollars as possible.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering a trade that gives me dollars. I have nothing to offer in return, so I should accept this trade to gain resources. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept your trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives Dollars: 10 | Player BLUE Gives Dollars: 0 </newly proposed trade>
```
